mainEntity.name: Can I file a trademark application for multiple classes in Mumbai?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. India allows multi-class applications under one filing. Each additional class requires a separate government fee (Rs 4,500/9,000 per class). We advise on which classes are essential for your business and brand protection strategy.

mainEntity.name: What happens if my trademark application receives an objection?

acceptedAnswer.text: Objections are common and not a rejection. We file a detailed reply (TM-O) with legal arguments, evidence of use, and distinctiveness justification. If the reply is accepted, the mark proceeds to publication. If not, a hearing is scheduled.

mainEntity.name: How do I protect my trademark internationally from Mumbai?

acceptedAnswer.text: India is a member of the Madrid Protocol. You can file an international application through the Indian Trademark Registry designating any member country. We handle the complete Madrid Protocol filing process.
